summary: Frontend-only validation completed for the three-pane /builder refactor. Core library/config/preview interactions, export actions, and draft save flow are working on the public URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Observed one transient mismatch in the first automation run where section-toggle count checks appeared out of sync; targeted retest passed consistently. Likely timing/animation sensitivity in test observation rather than product logic failure.
seed_data_creation: Created one real draft via UI save flow: draftId e399f0ff-0520-47e6-b1ff-a9af083c3522.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /builder public URL. data-testid coverage is strong across panes. Verified: section/subsection toggles sync to config+preview, variable+raw edits reflect in preview, copy/download actions work, draft save writes draftId to URL.
rca of the issue: No blocking product issue identified. One initial flaky observation was mitigated by explicit state/aria checks and slightly longer waits.
